### [Stocks Rise With Futures, Bonds Drop on Inflation: Markets Wrap](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-05-12/asian-stocks-under-pressure-as-us-inflation-rises-markets-wrap)

- **來源：** Bloomberg Markets
- **時間：** Tue, 12 May 2026 22:08:25 GMT
- **摘要：** Stocks swung to a gain as dip buyers stepped in following early weakness in chipmakers, betting a record-breaking rally has more room to run. Government bonds from Australia to Japan followed Treasuries lower after faster-than-expected US inflation data.

### [MSCI Removes Stocks Linked to Indonesia’s Richest From Indexes](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-05-12/msci-removes-stocks-linked-to-indonesia-s-richest-from-indexes)

- **來源：** Bloomberg Markets
- **時間：** Tue, 12 May 2026 21:38:47 GMT
- **摘要：** MSCI Inc. cut some Indonesian stocks linked to the country’s richest billionaires from its indexes, following through on a warning last month that it will exclude companies with concentrated ownership. The shares fell.

### [India More Than Doubles Gold, Silver Tariffs to Defend Rupee](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-05-13/india-hikes-gold-and-silver-import-tariffs-to-protect-economy)

- **來源：** Bloomberg Markets
- **時間：** Wed, 13 May 2026 01:47:16 GMT
- **摘要：** India has raised import tariffs on gold and silver in an attempt to defend its currency, as the country races to shore up foreign-exchange reserves and limit the damage from the war in the Middle East.

### [Pettis on China's Growth Woes, Global Trade Imbalances](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/videos/2026-05-13/pettis-on-china-s-growth-woes-global-trade-imbalances-video)

- **來源：** Bloomberg Markets
- **時間：** Wed, 13 May 2026 04:17:07 GMT
- **摘要：** Carnegie Endowment for International Peace Senior Fellow Michael Pettis discusses his outlook for the summit between Chinese President Xi Jinping and US President Donald Trump. He also offers insights on the challenges of rebalancing trade. He speaks with Haslinda Amin on "Insight with Haslinda Amin." (Source: Bloomberg)

### [Oil Dips After Three-Day Gain With Iran Peace Talks at Impasse](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-05-12/latest-oil-market-news-and-analysis-for-may-13)

- **來源：** Bloomberg Markets
- **時間：** Tue, 12 May 2026 22:03:44 GMT
- **摘要：** Oil slipped after rising almost 8% over the past three sessions as a resolution to the Middle East conflict remains elusive, with Iranian exports showing further strain from a US Naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.
